title: Costs of program
doc_html:
PART IV.  COSTS OF PROGRAM

§3654.  Costs of program

All costs of the program provided for herein that require any local expenditure of school board funds shall be reimbursed by the state.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 207, §1.
doc_text:
PART IV.  COSTS OF PROGRAM
§3654.  Costs of program
All costs of the program provided for herein that require any local expenditure of school board funds shall be reimbursed by the state.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 207, §1.
